title: To Clementina, Patrician.

verses.book: Selected Epistles of Gregory the Great.
Selected Epistles of Gregory the Great.
verses.text: Know, glorious daughter, that the presbyter Amandus has been elected to the episcopate by the people of Surrentum.

verses.book: Selected Epistles of Gregory the Great.
verses.text: And, we having written for him to be sent hither, you ought not to be saddened for his absence, seeing that one who is with you in heart should not even be believed to be departing from you.

verses.book: Selected Epistles of Gregory the Great.
verses.text: And, since he who once pleased you is acceptable to those who want a bishop, bless Almighty God for this, and with Christian devotion rejoice the more; and gladly do your best to further his coming to us for the advantage of others speedily, since it is the part of sincere charity to exult when one who is loved is called that he may grow.
